fields.title: Extend canonical memory schema for indexed summaries
fields.description: Current memory entries in extensions/tau/src/memory/format.ts only carry id, content, and timestamps, and the frozen snapshot renderer emits full entry bodies. To support compact prompt injection and read-by-id, tau needs a richer canonical entry shape in JSONL without adding any derived memory files.
fields.design: Update the canonical memory schema and service in extensions/tau/src/memory/format.ts and extensions/tau/src/services/curated-memory.ts so each entry has explicit scope, type, summary, and full content alongside id and timestamps. Keep JSONL buckets as the only persisted state, preserve locking and atomic writes, and provide migration from existing entries that only have content. The schema should support a derived compact index view without changing the single-source-of-truth rule.
fields.notes: Suggested executor: deep. This task is schema-heavy and sets the contract for the rest of the epic.
